portrait-major.prompt: Enhance this small 80x80 painted character portrait from a 1998 strategy game. The reference images show the painted brush-stroke style and texture quality to match. Preserve the EXACT facial features, expression, skin tone, hair, clothing, and color palette from the source. Do not modernize, photorealize, or change the art style. Do not alter the face or substitute a different person. Output at the same aspect ratio.

portrait-mini.prompt: Enhance this tiny 61x25 character mini-icon from a 1998 strategy game. The reference images show the painted style and texture quality to match. Sharpen facial features while preserving the EXACT compact proportions, colors, and composition from the source. Do not add background detail or change the subject.

ship-construction.prompt: Enhance this small 130x65 ship construction progress view from a 1998 strategy game.

damage-diagram.prompt: Enhance this small ship damage diagram from a 1998 strategy game.

reactor-diagram.prompt: Enhance this small reactor/power system diagram from a 1998 strategy game.

facility-icon.prompt: Enhance this small facility status icon from a 1998 strategy game.

event-scene.prompt: Enhance this 400x200 narrative event scene from a 1998 strategy game.

character-panel.prompt: Enhance this 400x200 character panel from a 1998 strategy game. The reference images show the painted art style and texture quality to match. Sharpen the character portrait and background scene while preserving the EXACT face, pose, text layout, and composition from the source. Do not alter text or change any element.
